name_en: Reproduction M12317 This Nano Bucket features the brand's new Monogram Mini pattern from the 2024 Fall/Winter collection, creating the latest version of the classic Monogram canvas. The design is accented with gold metal hardware, featuring an internal pocket and a detachable leather key charm, along with double top handles and an adjustable shoulder strap for multiple carrying options. 13 x 17 x 9 cm (Length x Height x Width)
